imageAlt: Late payments roadmap item preview image
title: Late payments
summaryBody: New legistlation coming mid 2027 means that there will be mandatory penalties for invoices paid late. We will build a way for customers to automatically reissue their invoices with the late payment fee added
detailBody: New legistlation coming mid 2027 means that there will be mandatory penalties for invoices paid late. We will build a way for customers to automatically reissue their invoices with the late payment fee added
